module.name: Search
module.param: | rest /servicesNS/-/-/configs/conf-app splunk_server=local | rename eai:acl.app as app | search app="$sideview.currentApp$" | stats last(build) as build last(version) as version last(description) as description

module.name: HTML
module.param:
Welcome to Sideview's Supporting App for Cisco Meeting Server $results[0].version$

Documentation can be found on our website here.

NOTE that while it is possible and even reasonable to use this app standalone, it is really designed to be used as an extension/adapter app for our main Cisco CDR Reporting and Analytics app. If you aren't familiar with that app yet, definitely reach out to us. You can get a free trial of it going easily and if you are installing an app for CMS.... you will like what you'll see in the trial.

That said, this app is in a relatively early stage and no matter your situation hopefully you are talking to us and you can always reach us at info@sideviewapps.com.

module.name: Search
module.param:
`custom_index` ( sourcetype="cms_cdr") | `streaming_cms_extractions`
| eval combined_cause_description = reason + " - " + cause_description | table call_id recordType deviceType encryptedMedia combined_cause_description ipAddress localAddress remoteAddress callingPartyNumber | eval encrypted_call_id=if(encryptedMedia=="true",call_id,null()) | stats dc(call_id) as calls dc(encrypted_call_id) as encrypted_calls dc(deviceType) as deviceTypes dc(callingPartyNumber) as partyNumbers

module.name: Search
module.param:
`custom_index` sourcetype="cms_cdr"
| `streaming_cms_extractions`
| eval duration=if(recordType=="callEnd",duration,null()) | stats min(_time) as _time max(duration) as duration by call_id ``` inline version of the Cisco CDR apps get_concurrency macro, the simpler version with no split-by ``` | eval increment = if(duration>0,mvappend("1","-1"),"0") | mvexpand increment | eval _time = if(increment==1, _time, _time + duration) | sort 0 + _time | streamstats sum(increment) as post_concurrency | eval concurrency = if(increment==-1, post_concurrency+1, post_concurrency) ``` inline version of the Cisco CDR apps timechart_for_concurrency macro, the simpler version with no split-by``` | timechart fixedrange=false bins=400 max(concurrency) as max_concurrency last(post_concurrency) as last_concurrency | filldown last_concurrency* | eval concurrency=coalesce(max_concurrency,last_concurrency) | fields - last_concurrency max_concurrency

module.name: Search
module.param:
`custom_index` ( sourcetype="cms_cdr")
| `streaming_cms_extractions`
| chart dc(call_id) as calls over callingPartyName | sort 0 calls desc
